title: Additional priority languages (low-resource focus)
context: After priority languages #1 and #2 (l10n-020, l10n-022), additional low-resource languages where WASH need is greatest are the next localization priority. Priority is partner-driven: languages identified by the secured distribution partner(s) take precedence. For each language, the full safety-accuracy review and numeric re-verification process from l10n-020/022 applies. Any additional HIGH-risk unit translation must also follow the l10n-021 numeric re-verification process.
objective: Translate the core medium-risk WASH content set into one or more additional priority languages (low-resource focus, partner-driven), each with safety-accuracy review (not just fluency) and the same process as l10n-020, with numeric re-verification for any HIGH-risk content following l10n-021.
acceptanceCriteria: Each additional priority language's translation covers the full core medium-risk content set and is reviewed by a competent speaker for both fluency and safety accuracy
Safety-accuracy review is documented in a PR-tied review-log entry for each language
Any HIGH-risk unit translated into additional languages has its numeric values independently re-verified in the target language per the l10n-021 process
Translated disclaimer text preserves the required framing in each target language; source attribution is preserved
Build-time i18n completeness check passes for each additional locale; reviewed and approved by a translation+safety reviewer distinct from the translator for each language
output: Committed locale catalogs for one or more additional priority languages covering the core medium-risk content set, with documented safety-accuracy review and PR-tied review-log entries.
